mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, gender, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, dept_id, post_id, user_type, login_type, is_first_login, password_error_count, password_error_time, lock_time, lock_reason, online_status, last_active_time, user_source, ext_data, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.avatar, u.gender, u.status, u.dept_id, u.create_time, u.update_time FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.avatar, u.gender, u.dept_id, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.last_active_time, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE u.online_status = 1 AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY u.last_active_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET online_status = #{onlineStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET last_active_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password_error_count = #{passwordErrorCount}, password_error_time = #{passwordErrorTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET lock_time = #{lockTime}, lock_reason = #{lockReason}, status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET lock_time = NULL, lock_reason = NULL, status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password_error_count = 0, password_error_time = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enabledUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disabledUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN online_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as onlineUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN user_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as systemUsers, SUM(CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as businessUsers FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT DATE(last_login_time) as loginDate, COUNT(*) as loginCount FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND last_login_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(last_login_time) ORDER BY loginDate DESC
